title: Legacy Solutions LLC
description: Responsive Landing Page Clone with Animations
features: Pixel-accurate layout matching the original design
Fully responsive across mobile, tablet, and desktop devices
Clean and scalable Vue component structure
Functional CTA buttons with smooth scrolling to form sections
Custom FAQ section and legal pages integration
details: This project involved developing a fully responsive and high-performance landing page based on a reference design. The website was built using Vue.js and Tailwind CSS, ensuring clean structure, fast performance, and modern UI styling.
goal: The goal was to create a visually appealing and highly functional landing page that accurately reflects the brand and provides an excellent user experience across all devices.

title: Omegus Prime
description: Figma to Website with Test Cases & SEO
features: Figma design converted into a fully functional website
Clean, scalable, and maintainable code structure
Fully responsive layout across mobile, tablet, and desktop
SEO-optimized codebase for improved search visibility
Unit testing implementation for code reliability
Detailed test cases to ensure functionality and stability
Optimized UI/UX for better user engagement
details:
This project involved designing and developing a modern business website from the ground up. The process started with translating the UI design from Figma into a fully functional and responsive website.

Beyond frontend development, I also implemented proper software engineering practices including test case writing, unit testing, and codebase SEO optimization to ensure the website performs well both technically and in search engines.
goal: The goal was to deliver a professional, scalable, and SEO-friendly website built with strong development standards and testing practices.

title: CodeSyncs
description: Full Stack Company Website with Firebase & Figma Design
features: Fully responsive layout across mobile, tablet, and desktop
Modern and clean UI tailored for a software company
Full-stack development with Firebase backend integration
Optimized component structure and scalable codebase
Smooth navigation and interactive user interface
Storing data for Blogs & Jobs using Firebase
details:
This project involved designing and developing a modern software company website from concept to deployment. The website was built by converting the original Figma design into a fully functional and responsive web application with a pixel-perfect layout.

The project also included full-stack development using Firebase for backend services, enabling dynamic functionality and scalable data management.
goal: The goal was to deliver a professional company website that reflects strong branding, modern design standards, and reliable backend functionality.

title: CloudHub
description: CloudHubb Website – Figma to Responsive Frontend
features: Fully responsive layout for mobile, tablet, and desktop
Modern and professional UI for a cloud services company
Smooth animations and interactive elements for enhanced user experience
Optimized frontend code structure for scalability
details:
This project involved developing the frontend of a modern cloud services company website by converting a Figma design into a fully responsive and functional web application.

The focus of the project was to deliver a pixel-perfect UI, smooth user experience, and clean frontend architecture while ensuring the website performs well across different devices and screen sizes.
goal: The goal was to create a professional and visually engaging company website that clearly presents cloud services while maintaining modern design standards and usability.

title: Otis Kit Pro
description: Modern Responsive SaaS Website Clone with Tailwind CSS
features: Clean and scalable Tailwind CSS structure
details:
I designed and developed a modern SaaS-style landing page using Tailwind CSS with a clean UI and engaging visual effects.

The landing page features a flipping card effect to showcase product features in an interactive way, along with a fully responsive design that ensures optimal viewing across all devices. The project focuses on delivering a visually appealing and user-friendly experience while maintaining high performance.
goal: The goal was to create a modern, visually appealing landing page that effectively communicates the value proposition of the Otis Kit Pro product and drives conversions.

title: Omnifood
description: Modern Responsive Food Delivery Restaurant Design
features: Fully responsive design across mobile, tablet, and desktop
Modern landing page layout with clear content sections
Smooth scrolling navigation and interactive UI elements
Optimized images and typography for better performance and readability
Pricing plans, testimonials, and call-to-action sections to enhance user engagement and conversions
details:
This project is a modern and fully responsive landing page developed for a fictional food delivery service. The goal of the project was to create a visually appealing and conversion-focused website that highlights healthy meal subscriptions and an easy ordering experience.

The landing page features a clean layout, smooth scrolling sections, and well-structured UI components designed to enhance user engagement and readability. The design focuses on showcasing meal options, subscription plans, testimonials, and a simple signup form to encourage conversions.
goal: The goal was to create a modern, user-friendly food delivery app that provides a seamless ordering experience and showcases a wide variety of delicious meals. This project demonstrates my ability to build professional landing pages with a strong focus on responsive design and user experience.

goal: The goal was to create a professional portfolio that highlights my projects, skills, and writing/blog content, while demonstrating a fully functional frontend integrated with Firebase backend services.
